title: All Falls Down
group_key: all falls down|alan walker,noah cyrus,digital farm animals,juliander

writers.composer: Alan Walker/Anders Froen/Pablo Bowman/Nick Gale/Rick Boardman/Sarah Blanchard

lyrics.text: What's the trick? I wish I knew
lyrics.translation: 爱的诀窍是什么 真希望我能懂

lyrics.text: I'm so done with thinking through all the things I could've been
lyrics.translation: 我受够了总是去想我本能完成的所有

lyrics.text: And I know you wonder too
lyrics.translation: 我知道你也渴望着我

lyrics.text: All it takes is that one look you do and I’ll run right back to you
lyrics.translation: 只需要看你一眼 就会立刻奔回你身边

lyrics.text: You crossed the line and it's time to say  F U
lyrics.translation: 你越过了界 所以是时候对你说不

lyrics.text: What's the point in saying that when you know how I'll react?
lyrics.translation: 当你知道我会是何反应 说那些又有何意义

lyrics.text: You think you can just take it back, but shit just don't work like that
lyrics.translation: 你以为你能收回一切 但偏偏老天就不开眼

lyrics.text: You're the drug that I'm addicted to and I want you so bad
lyrics.translation: 你是让我无比上瘾的药 我无比渴望着你

lyrics.text: Guess I'm stuck with you and that's that
lyrics.translation: 我想我注定和你在一起 仅此而已

lyrics.text: Cause when it all falls down, then whatever
lyrics.translation: 当一切都陨落破碎 就怎样都好

lyrics.text: When it don't work out for the better
lyrics.translation: 当事情并没有变得更好

lyrics.text: If it just ain't right, and it's time to say goodbye
lyrics.translation: 若一切就是怎么也不对 那就是时候止损告别

lyrics.text: When it all falls down, when it all falls down
lyrics.translation: 当一切都陨落破碎 当一切都不再完美

lyrics.text: I'll be fine
lyrics.translation: 我会安然无恙

lyrics.text: I'll be fine
lyrics.translation: 我也无所谓

lyrics.text: You're the drug that I'm addicted to and I want you so bad
lyrics.translation: 你是让我无比上瘾的药 我无比想要你

lyrics.text: But I'll be fine
lyrics.translation: 但没有也很好

lyrics.text: Why we fight? I don't know
lyrics.translation: 为何我们要争吵 我不知道

lyrics.text: We say what hurts the most
lyrics.translation: 我们总说着最伤人的话

lyrics.text: Oh, I tried staying cold, but you take it personal
lyrics.translation: 噢我试着保持冷静 你却保持针对

lyrics.text: All these firing shots and making ground
lyrics.translation: 所有的唇枪舌炮和所有的事有人为

lyrics.text: It's way too hard to cope, but I still can't let you go
lyrics.translation: 一切都太难应对 但我还是无法放弃你

lyrics.text: Cause when it all falls down, then whatever
lyrics.translation: 当一切都陨落破碎 就怎样都好

lyrics.text: When it don't work out for the better
lyrics.translation: 当事情并没有变得更好

lyrics.text: If it just ain't right, and it's time to say goodbye
lyrics.translation: 若一切就是怎么也不对 那就是时候止损告别

lyrics.text: When it all falls down, when it all falls down
lyrics.translation: 当一切都陨落破碎 当一切都不再完美

lyrics.text: I'll be fine
lyrics.translation: 我会安然无恙

lyrics.text: I'll be fine
lyrics.translation: 我也无所谓

lyrics.text: You're the drug that I'm addicted to and I want you so bad
lyrics.translation: 你是让我无比上瘾的药 我无比想要你

lyrics.text: But I'll be fine
lyrics.translation: 但没有也很好

lyrics.text: I'll be fine-ine-fine, fine-ine-ine
lyrics.translation: 我都会很好 我都无所谓

lyrics.text: I'll be fine-ine-fine, fine-ine-ine
lyrics.translation: 我都能面对 我都无所谓

lyrics.text: I'll be fine-ine-fine, fine-ine-ine
lyrics.translation: 我都会很好 我都无所谓

lyrics.text: I'll be fine-ine-fine, fine
lyrics.translation: 无论怎样我都无所谓

lyrics.text: Cause when it all falls down, then whatever (Then whatever, babe)
lyrics.translation: 当一切都陨落破碎 就怎样都好

lyrics.text: When it don't work out for the better (For the better)
lyrics.translation: 当事情并没有变得更好

lyrics.text: If it just ain't right, and it's time to say goodbye
lyrics.translation: 若一切就是怎么也不对 那就是时候止损告别

lyrics.text: When it all falls down (When it all, when it all)
lyrics.translation: 当一切都陨落破碎 当一切都不再完美

lyrics.text: When it all falls down (When it all falls down)
lyrics.translation: 当一切都陨落破碎

lyrics.text: I'll be fine (Fine, fine, fine)
lyrics.translation: 我会安然无恙

lyrics.text: I'll be fine (I'll be fine)
lyrics.translation: 我也无所谓

lyrics.text: You're the drug that I'm addicted to and I want you so bad
lyrics.translation: 你是让我无比上瘾的药 我无比想要你

lyrics.text: But I'll be fine (I'll be fine), and that's that
lyrics.translation: 但没有也无所谓 仅此而已

source_file: All Falls Down - Alan Walker,Noah Cyrus,Digital Farm Animals,Juliander.lrc
